scope: Paid (Google Ads) visits only. US visitors. Internal/test visits excluded.
method: Based on PostHog session recordings for paid (Google Ads) visitors: each visit's start time, landing page, clicks, form activity and outcome. Anything unusual (such as an odd click pattern) is flagged for review and confirmed before being reported as an issue, rather than assumed.

posthog.filter: Paid Search channel, US, test visits excluded

reconciliation.note: June 13 had 3 paid clicks (Google Ads) and 1 recorded paid visit (33% coverage). Not every paid click is captured as a recorded visit - very short or instant bounces fall away once the under-1-second filter and recorder load are accounted for. The single recorded visit landed on the Madison residential roofing page, browsed briefly and left. No form submissions on the day, matching 0 qualified paid leads in the conversion dashboard for June 13.

sessions.label: Visit 1
sessions.verdict: Browsed the Madison residential roofing page for about half a minute, then left without starting or submitting the form (a bounce).

insights.headline: 3 paid clicks, 1 recorded paid visit on June 13, no submissions
insights.body: Google Ads recorded 3 paid clicks from US visitors on June 13. PostHog captured 1 of them as a recorded visit (33% coverage); the other clicks were not captured, typical of very short or instant bounces. The recorded visit did not start or submit the contact form.

insights.headline: The one recorded visit was a quick mobile bounce
insights.body: The single recorded visit was on a mobile phone from the Madison, Wisconsin area, landed on the Madison residential roofing page from a Google Ads search, browsed for about half a minute with no form typing and no clicks, and left.

insights.headline: No form activity and nothing flagged
insights.body: There were no form starts, no submissions, no phone taps and no confirmed friction on June 13, and no visit showed an unusual pattern that needed a closer look.

insights.headline: A quiet, lower-intent day
insights.body: June 13 was a light traffic day with low paid volume and a single short recorded visit, consistent with quieter weekend roofing demand.

data_notes: Window: June 13, 2026 (US Central). The visit is dated by its exact start time in US Central time.
Scope: paid (Google Ads) visits only, US visitors, internal and test visits excluded.
Privacy: visitor names and emails are not shown. The visit is referenced by an anonymous label and recording link only.
The recorded visit had no form typing, no clicks and no errors - there were no form starts, submissions, phone taps or confirmed friction on June 13.
Paid clicks for June 13: 3 (from the conversion dashboard's Google Ads daily series). 1 of the 3 clicks was captured as a recorded visit (33%); not every paid click results in a recording.
Weekly totals (June 7-13): 28 paid clicks, 23 recorded visits, 2 form starts, 2 submissions.
headline_state: Paid visitor sessions for June 13 (US Central). 3 paid clicks and 1 recorded paid visit (33% coverage), a single quick mobile bounce with no form typing, and 0 form submissions. No visits flagged for review. June 13 paid clicks are reconciled against the conversion dashboard.
